channel.title: Blog site of Jacques Van Blokland
channel.description: Recent content on Blog site of Jacques Van Blokland

item.title: Test Blog
item.description:
Obsidian

  • Obsidian is the BEST notes application in the world. Go download it: https://obsidian.md/

The Setup

  • Create the new folder labeled posts. This is where you will add your blog posts
  • ….that’s all you have to do
  • Actually…wait…find out where your Obsidian directories are. Right click your posts folder and choose show in system explorer
  • You will need this directory in upcoming steps !
